title: centaurea nitiida
intro: Centaurea nitiida, also known as the thorny knapweed, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurea nitiida include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies to promote wound healing and soothe respiratory issues.
